action: Add a bitemporal decision-event model so corrections and reconciliation lag can be represented without erasing earlier observations.

claim_states.observed: DE-0001 records the repository-visible M-002 sidecar and stale aggregate queue as simultaneous facts.
claim_states.proposed: DE-0002 proposes bitemporal correction semantics for future continuity work.
unresolved: M-002 remains absent from the shared ACTIVE_QUEUE aggregate and requires conflict-safe reconciliation.

verification.method: GitHub contents API accepted the schema and ledger as additive UTF-8 JSON files; both commits are immutable source identities for review.

privacy_boundary: Only public repository files and commit metadata were indexed. No raw chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or uploaded-file contents were copied.
handoff: Reconcile M-002 and M-003 into operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json only on a conflict-free aggregate update. The next continuity slice should add a deterministic validator for decision-events.json and record the first true correction/supersession pair when one is observed.
